rows.reason: Pinned Stim v1.16.0 has no public CLI or stim_perf row that canonical-prints a .stim circuit without changing the workload into result-format conversion or diagram generation.
rows.follow_up: Replace this waiver with a faithful comparable baseline if Stim exposes circuit canonical-print timing, or keep the Stab-only timing plus M4 parser/printer parity tests as the contract evidence.

rows.reason: Pinned Stim v1.16.0 exposes DEM parsing through commands such as `convert --dem` and `sample_dem`, but it has no public CLI or stim_perf row that canonical-prints an existing .dem file.
